regions.content:
技术要求:
定子引出线按GB/T7345-2008要求:
对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.ON的拉力；
引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
regions.content_en: Technical requirements: Stator lead wires per GB/T7345-2008: For stator three-phase wires, each lead wire shall withstand a pull of 9.ON; the lead wire shall not break, and the insulation layer and wire core shall not be damaged.

labels.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.ON的拉力；
引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
labels.translation_en_simple: Lead wire not broken, insulation and core intact.
labels.translation_en_full: The lead wire must not be broken; the insulation layer and core must not be damaged.

records.label_text_original: 对定子三相线，每根引出线应能承受9.ON的拉力；
引出线不能断开，绝缘层和线芯不能损坏。
records.translation_en_simple: Lead wire not broken, insulation and core intact.
records.translation_en_full: The lead wire must not be broken; the insulation layer and core must not be damaged.
